_meta.description: Copy and labels for the Research page.

en.heroDescription: Use this page to explain your themes, methods, and ongoing work beyond the short summary on the homepage.
en.collaboration: Interested in collaboration, advising, or internships? Point visitors to the Contact page.

zh.heroDescription: 这个页面适合用来展开介绍你的研究主题、方法路线和正在推进的工作。
zh.collaboration: 如果希望接收合作、指导或实习咨询，可以把访客引导到联系页面。
